/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/QtChatClient_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/chatclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/chatwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/contactwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/creategroupwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/infowidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/loginwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/QtChatClient.dir/mainwidget.cpp.o -o /home/woshi/chat/chat/bin/QtChatClient  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
